betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6RT Generator§f

§aPassive power generation using RTG pellets — consistent, safe, and long-lasting!§f

§bThe Radioisotope Thermoelectric Generator§f (RT Generator) produces power from §bRTG Pellets§f. It's compact, safe (with proper PPE), and provides consistent power without fuel consumption.

§6Crafting§f (Assembly Factory):
§b• 3×§f RTG Unit
§b• 4×§f Steel Plate
§b• 4×§f Red Copper Wire
§b• 3×§f Bakelite Bar

§6Operation§f:
§b• Max heat§f: §e600§f (accumulated from pellets)
§b• Max output§f: §e60 kHE/s§f at full heat
§b• No battery§f: place adjacent to a battery socket or connect directly to your grid

§6RTG Pellets§f (by output):
§b• Pu-238§f: §e10§f power/tick (long lifespan)
§b• U-238§f: §e5§f power/tick (cheaper, half the output)
§b• Am-241§f: §e20§f power/tick (late game)
§b• Sr-90§f: moderate output, decays to recyclable zirconium

§c⚠ Safety§f: Handle RTG pellets with proper radiation protection (hazmat suit or better)!

§eTip§f: With decay enabled, most RTG pellets last over a real year. Set up an RT Generator for §bpassive§f power that runs forever without fuel input!
